2395460.name: Dinosaurs United
2395460.description:
Dinosaurs United is an epic real-time strategy game that challenges you to unite the dinosaurs and save the world from an oncoming comet. As you gather resources, conquer lands, and defeat giant boss enemies, you'll develop advanced technologies and weapons needed to stop the comet and prevent the extinction of all life.

In the age of dinosaurs, one visionary Dino sees a vision of the world being hit by a comet. He unites the dinosaurs around the world to work together and develop a super weapon to destroy the oncoming comet. Along the way, you'll encounter challenges and enemies that will test your strategic skills to the limit.

With a top-down view and heart-pumping gameplay, Dinosaurs United challenges you to race against time to gather resources, unite more dinosaurs, and face the final, epic challenge. Will you rise to the occasion and lead the dinosaurs to victory?

Features include challenging missions, diverse dinosaur units, customizable technologies and weapons, and stunning visuals that bring the prehistoric world to life. With a deep and immersive storyline, Dinosaurs United will keep you on the edge of your seat as you fight to save the world. Are you ready to take on the challenge? Play now and find out!
2395460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
